mood: Warm, trustworthy, efficient, family-centric, and organic.
design_philosophy: Avoid typical cold 'tech' or 'AI' tropes (no purple gradients or sterile neon). Instead, embrace a culinary and family-oriented warmth using organic colors, soft shapes, and highly accessible typography. The UI should feel like a modern, smart kitchen companion rather than a sterile database.

cards.style: bg-surface rounded-3xl border border-border shadow-sm p-5

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_secondary text-primary rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#E8E3D2] transition-colors

alerts.expiring: bg-accent_alert_bg text-accent_alert rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center gap-3

badges.kid_friendly: bg-[#F4F1E1] text-[#A67C00] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold
badges.ai_generated: bg-[#EBF2EA] text-primary rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1

motion_and_interaction.hover_state: All interactive elements must transition smoothly (duration 200-300ms, ease-out). Buttons and cards should slightly lift.
motion_and_interaction.camera_scan_animation: Use a subtle, warm-toned scanning line (e.g., sage green or terracotta) with an overlay over the live camera view. No sci-fi lasers.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up for entering content.

icons_and_assets.style: Use rounded, soft icons. Avoid sharp or overly technical iconography.
icons_and_assets.ai_icon_strategy: Instead of stars/sparkles, use a sprout or chef hat icon to represent the AI Assistant.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text, especially white text on primary backgrounds, meets WCAG AA standards. Avoid low contrast gray-on-gray.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: CRITICAL: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, recipe cards, inventory items) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="recipe-card-pancakes"').

inventory_scan_demo.description: Inside of a well-stocked, colorful refrigerator for the camera scan simulation.

kid_friendly_meal.description: Child eating a healthy meal, use as thumbnail for family-friendly recipe category.

family_cooking.description: Father and son cooking together, use for the Family Profile or empty state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first, dashboard-style interface with bottom navigation or a sticky bottom action bar.
Use the specified typography (Outfit for headings, Work Sans for body). Do NOT use Inter.
Implement the Fridge Inventory Dashboard using a bento-style grid for items.
Create the Camera Scan Simulation with a realistic viewfinder overlay, showing the `inventory_scan_demo` image.
Use the exact color hex codes provided to maintain the organic, warm aesthetic.
Ensure the AI Recipe Assistant features prominently but feels like a helpful kitchen guide rather than a chatbot.
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all actionable components.
